query: SELECT CONCAT('[', UPPER(status), '] #', id, ' (', priority, ') - ', LEFT(description, 120), ' | page: ', COALESCE(page, 'n/a'), ' | ', DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) as log_entry FROM changeRequests ORDER BY FIELD(status, 'pending', 'in_progress', 'done'), createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute SELECT CONCAT('[', UPPER(status), '] #', id, ' (', priority, ') - ', LEFT(description, 120), ' | page: ', COALESCE(page, 'n/a'), ' | ', DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) as log_entry FROM changeRequests ORDER BY FIELD(status, 'pending', 'in_progress', 'done'), createdAt DESC;
